sourceAmbiguity: Signed-out and post-timeout states could fall through to a blank or generic landing surface.
decisionTaken: Added a signed-out clean screen and session-expired recovery screen that keep the same shell and display only non-sensitive continuity context.
whyThisFitsTheBlueprint: Same-shell continuity remains intact while cookies, CSRF, and writable grants are cleared or narrowed.
operationalRisk: Copy can over-reassure if it implies the patient is still authenticated after sign-out.
followUpIfPolicyChanges: Review copy whenever session-governor termination settlement reason codes change.
